cluster.description: Name of the parent Kubernetes cluster (the `Kubernetes` CR) in the same namespace this node pool attaches to. Required. The pool's CAPI objects are wired to the parent cluster `kubernetes-<cluster>`; the KubernetesNodes CR must be named `<cluster>-<pool>`.

storageClass.description: StorageClass for the worker node system disk. When empty, the cluster default applies. Worker VMs live-migrate, so their disks need ReadWriteMany — the RWX access mode is supplied by the chosen StorageClass's CDI StorageProfile — and linstor-csi rejects RWX volumes that are not on a DRBD-backed StorageClass, so prefer a replicated/DRBD class.

minReplicas.description: Minimum number of replicas in this pool. Used as the cluster-autoscaler floor.

maxReplicas.description: Maximum number of replicas in this pool. Used as the cluster-autoscaler ceiling.

diskSize.description: System disk size for the worker VM. Carries the Talos OS image (factory.talos.dev raw artifact streamed in by CDI), kubelet state, containerd image cache, and any local-path PVCs.

roles.description: List of node roles. Each role `r` labels nodes with `node-role.kubernetes.io/<r>`. Use `[ingress-nginx]` for a pool that hosts the tenant ingress-nginx controller.

resources.description: Explicit CPU and memory for each worker node, as an alternative to `instanceType` sizing. Optional: when omitted, the node is sized by `instanceType`. When both `cpu` and `memory` are set, they take precedence and `instanceType` is ignored (the instancetype is omitted from the VM, since KubeVirt cannot override an instancetype's CPU/memory). Set both `cpu` and `memory` together or neither; setting only one is rejected at render time.

gpus.description: List of GPUs to attach (NVIDIA driver requires at least 4 GiB RAM).

kubelet.description: Kubelet resource reservations for this pool.

evictionHardMemory.description: Hard eviction threshold for memory (absolute like 200Mi or percentage like 7%).

evictionSoftMemory.description: Soft eviction threshold for memory (absolute like 1Gi or percentage like 10%).

kubeReservedCpu.description: CPU reserved for kubelet and container runtime. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

kubeReservedMemory.description: Memory reserved for kubelet and container runtime. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

systemReservedCpu.description: CPU reserved for host OS. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

systemReservedMemory.description: Memory reserved for host OS. Auto-computed from instanceType if empty.

maxUnhealthy.description: Maximum number of unhealthy nodes tolerated in this pool before remediation is paused. The MachineHealthCheck admission webhook accepts either a bare integer ("0", "1", ...) or a percentage ("0%", "50%"); bare numeric strings are rejected, so the safer default is a percentage. Drop to "0%" once the pool is stable.

nodeStartupTimeout.description: Maximum time a Machine is allowed to spend reaching the Ready condition before it is remediated. Raise for slow first boots (Talos image fetch from factory.talos.dev or a busy storage class on the kubevirt-csi PVC populator).

version.description: Kubernetes major.minor version the pool joins. Must match the parent cluster's version and satisfy the Talos<->Kubernetes support matrix against `talos.version`.

talos.description: Talos worker image configuration. Keep in sync with the parent cluster's `talos`.

imageFactoryURL.description: Base URL of the Talos Image Factory that serves the worker OS disk image (the `openstack-amd64.raw.xz` raw artifact streamed in by CDI over HTTP). Defaults to the public factory. Point at a self-hosted Image Factory, a caching mirror, or an internal HTTP file server for air-gapped, rate-limited, or flaky-egress environments. No trailing slash.

installerRepository.description: OCI repository prefix for the Talos installer image used by the in-guest `talos-reconcile` upgrade Job. Resolved as `<installerRepository>/<schematicID>:<version>`. Defaults to the public factory's installer path. Override for air-gapped or mirrored registries. No trailing slash.

schematicID.description: Talos image-factory schematic ID. Defaults to the cozystack-tested vanilla schematic. Operators using custom schematics (system extensions, kernel args) override here.

version.description: Talos release used for worker OS image and installer. Must satisfy the chart's Talos<->Kubernetes support matrix against the chosen `version`.

images.description: Optional image overrides for air-gapped or rate-limited registries.

kubectl.description: Image used by the talos-reconcile Job (kubectl). Empty falls back to images/kubectl.tag.
